ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Apr-07-2026 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Apr-01-2026 Continued To Apr-07-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Jan-06-2026 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Nov-25-2025 Continued To Jan-06-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Peter Pelavin for co-executors Linda May Lee and Joyce Kim Lee-Wan (via Zoom).

The matter was called for hearing on Status on Close of Estate.

The Court inquired regarding the status of the petition for final distribution or filing of a status report. Mr. Pelavin stated that the petition had been drafted and that they were awaiting receipt of a bank statement expected in December to finalize the amounts. He requested a continuance to allow for additional time.

The Court continued the matter to January 6, 2026, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204.

Judge: Russell S. Roeca; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Nov-12-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Peter Pelavin for Petitioners Linda May Lee and Joyce Kim Lee-Wan.

The Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated October 13, 2000 is admitted to probate. Linda May Lee and Joyce Kim Lee-Wan are appointed as the Executors of the estate with full authority. Karen Ann Simons is appointed the probate referee. Bond is not required. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for Novermber 25, 2025 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Oct-22-2024 Continued To Nov-12-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Peter Pelavin appeared by zoom for petitioners.

The court noted that it received a declaration, but it was not verified by Mr. Pelavin's client. Mr. Pelavin stated that he can resubmit it with the verification. The Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary is continued to November 12, 2024, at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Mr. Pelavin is to file the verified declaration by November 5, 2024.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Colhour. Not reported.
